discrepancy_note: Ord. 2026-01 docx Permitted Use Table references §4.30 for this use, but Chapter 4 does not contain a Section 4.30. The substantive requirements are in §8.15 (Electronic Gaming Operations). This appears to be a drafting error in the 2026-01 table. Flagged for ZA confirmation — do not silently correct as the discrepancy is legally significant.
